steps.expected: Duplicate form opens with source values pre-filled and Duplicate heading
steps.observed: Opened /admin/categories/new?duplicateId=17; form fields pre-filled: name, uri segment, description, display, allow ads, parent, keywords, order

steps.action: Submit duplicate form with Create Category
steps.expected: New category row created with new ID; original unchanged
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/categories; DB shows original id=17 unchanged and duplicate id=22 created with URI suffix _1

evidence.network: POST /api/admin/categories observed in browser network log

assertions.title: Duplicate — invalid ID

steps.observed: No redirect; stayed on /admin/categories/new?duplicateId=abc and rendered inline error 'Invalid category ID' with Back to Categories link

evidence.network: UI called GET /api/admin/categories/NaN/duplicate; supplemental curl GET /api/admin/categories/abc/duplicate -> 400

assertions.issues: Behavior does not match contract redirect+flash requirement; current implementation shows inline error page instead.

steps.expected: Category deleted, redirected with success, image removed, no orphan links
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/categories; category id=18 removed; image file g5dupdel_1773939084_noart.png removed; no junction rows remain

evidence.network: DELETE /api/admin/categories/18 observed in browser network log

assertions.title: Delete category with articles — reassignment prompt

steps.action: Open /admin/categories/19/delete for category with one linked article
steps.expected: Prompt shows article count and replacement dropdown with hierarchy
steps.observed: Prompt displayed 'This category has 1 article' and replacement dropdown with indented hierarchy entries (e.g., » g5dupdel_1773939084_repl_child)

evidence.network: GET /api/admin/categories/19, GET /api/admin/categories/19/article-count, GET /api/admin/categories observed in browser network log

assertions.title: Delete category with articles — reassignment executes

steps.action: Select replacement category id=16 and submit delete
steps.expected: Articles reassigned, old category deleted, success redirect
steps.observed: Redirected to /admin/categories; old category id=19 removed; article2cat for article id=18 moved from category 19 to 16

evidence.network: DELETE /api/admin/categories/19 observed in browser network log

steps.action: Login as g5dupdel_1773939084_user (group without can_delete_categories) and attempt delete on id=23
steps.observed: Delete request rejected; supplemental API call returned 403 Forbidden: insufficient permissions; category id=23 remained

steps.expected: Redirect to categories grid with error flash and no deletion
steps.observed: Immediately redirected to /admin/categories; no category deleted; API also returns 400 for invalid ID

frictions.description: agent-browser wait --url '**/admin' and '**/login' timed out despite successful navigation to matching sub-routes with query params
frictions.resolution: Used get url + snapshot to confirm landed route and continued flow

frictions.description: agent-browser network output did not include HTTP status codes for captured requests
frictions.resolution: Added supplemental curl captures for status/body assertions (400/403 and duplicate endpoint 200)

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 7 passed, 1 failed. Failure: VAL-CAT-032 because invalid duplicate ID does not redirect to grid with flash; it renders inline error on duplicate form route instead.
